attack_pattern.description: Thrash → Enlarging Strike → Bug Sting → Adapt → Guarded Strike → repeat
Dramatic Open → Hunger → Scrutiny → Grasp → repeat
Power Dance → Quick Slash → Boomerang → repeat
Orb Of Frailty → Orb Of Weakness → Beam → Ritual → repeat
Starts: Curse of Knowledge → Slap → Knowledge Overwhelming → Ponder; then conditional: Curse of Knowledge (if curse of knowledge counter < 3) / Slap (if curse of knowledge counter >= 3)

Starts: Puppet Strings → Your Mine; then conditional: Burn Bright for Me (if does not have amalgam died) / Off with Your Head (if has amalgam died); then conditional: Burn Bright for Me (if does not have amalgam died) / Off with Your Head (if has amalgam died)
Targeting Reticle → Precision Beam → Charge Up → Laser → Recharge → repeat
Beckon → De-Gas → Gaze → Fade → Scream → repeat
Starts: Bite → Skull Bash; then conditional: Multi Claw (if respawns < 2) / Phase3 Lacerate (if respawns >= 2)
Liquify Ground → Thrash Move 1 → Lunging Bite → Salivate → Thrash Move 2 → repeat
Tackle 1 → Tackle 2 → Beam → Tackle 3 → Tackle 4 → repeat
Ink Blot → Inky Lance → Dismember → Prepare → repeat
Pressurize → Stomp → Ram → Siphon → Pressure Gun → Pressure Up → repeat
